allow: Bash(echo "===.claude/skills==="; find /tmp/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/.claude/skills -maxdepth 2 | sort; echo; echo "===src/ui-ux-pro-max==="; find /tmp/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/src/ui-ux-pro-max -maxdepth 2 | sort; echo; echo "===README head==="; head -60 /tmp/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/README.md)

Bash(echo "=== Claude desktop config ==="; ls -la "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Claude/" 2>&1 | grep -iE "config|json|mcp" ; echo "=== node via common managers \(interactive paths\) ==="; ls "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/" 2>/dev/null; ls /usr/local/bin/ 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "^node|^npm|^npx"; echo "=== node app bundle inside Claude? ==="; find "/Applications/Claude.app" -maxdepth 6 -name "node" -type f 2>/dev/null | head)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); lts=[r for r in d if r['lts']]; print\('LATEST_LTS', lts[0]['version'], lts[0]['lts']\)")
Bash(python3 scripts/search.py "premium trustworthy real estate land plots selling residential agricultural commercial" --design-system -p "Zyrah Properties")
